hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '—'); count=$(git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); jq -nc --arg b "$branch" --arg c "$count" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:("Anna · branch: " + $b + " · changed files: " + $c)},systemMessage:("Anna · " + $b + " · " + $c + " souborů")}'

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) mkdir -p .claude; { echo "[$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H:%M:%S)] typecheck after $f"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; echo "[exit: $?]"; echo ''; } >> .claude/typecheck.log ;; esac

mkdir -p .claude; if jq -e '.scripts.lint' package.json > /dev/null 2>&1; then if ! npm run lint > .claude/lint.log 2>&1; then jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Lint selhal — oprav chyby a zkus znovu. Detaily v .claude/lint.log"}}'; exit 0; fi; fi; if ! npx tsc --noEmit > .claude/tsc-precommit.log 2>&1; then jq -nc '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Typecheck selhal — oprav typové chyby a zkus znovu. Detaily v .claude/tsc-precommit.log"}}'; exit 0; fi
